name: Avuka — PDF Renderer Pipeline v2
description: Webhook from Base44 הפק PDF → fetches FilledForm+Customer+Site → calls Python renderer on Render.com → uploads PDF to Supabase → updates FilledForm.generated_pdf

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filename: 'avuka_insp' + $('Build Render Payload').item.json.form_num + '_' + $('Build Render Payload').item.json.inspection_id + '.pdf', pdf_base64: $json.pdf_base64 }) }}
